{| style="border:1px solid #ddd;background-color:#F9F9F9;padding:5px;font-size:85%" |style="background:#cce;font-size:118%;padding:0 1em 0 1em" align=center|'''[[宮中祭祀]]の主要祭儀一覧''' |- |[[四方拝]]・[[歳旦祭]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[元始祭]] |- |[[奏事始]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[昭和天皇]]祭（[[先帝祭]]） |- |[[孝明天皇]]例祭（先帝以前三代の例祭） |-style="background:#ddf" |[[祈年祭]] |- |[[天長祭]]（天長節祭） |-style="background:#ddf" |春季[[皇霊祭]]・春季[[神殿祭]] |- |[[神武天皇祭]]・[[皇霊殿]][[御神楽]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[香淳皇后]]例祭（先后の例祭） |- |[[節折]]・[[大祓]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[明治天皇]]例祭（先帝以前三代の例祭） |- |秋季皇霊祭・秋季神殿祭 |-style="background:#ddf" |[[神嘗祭]] |- |[[新嘗祭]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[賢所]]御神楽 |- |[[大正天皇]]例祭（先帝以前三代の例祭） |-style="background:#ddf" |節折・大祓 |}
==Documentation== {{draft categories|[[Category:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]]

{| style="border:1px solid #ddd;background-color:#F9F9F9;padding:5px;font-size:85%" |style="background:#cce;font-size:118%;padding:0 1em 0 1em" align=center|[[Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace]] |- |[[四方拝]]・[[歳旦祭]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[元始祭]] |- |[[奏事始]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[昭和天皇]]祭（[[先帝祭]]） |- |[[孝明天皇]]例祭（先帝以前三代の例祭） |-style="background:#ddf" |[[祈年祭]] |- |[[天長祭]]（天長節祭） |-style="background:#ddf" |春季[[皇霊祭]]・春季[[神殿祭]] |- |[[神武天皇祭]]・[[皇霊殿]][[御神楽]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[香淳皇后]]例祭（先后の例祭） |- |[[節折]]・[[大祓]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[明治天皇]]例祭（先帝以前三代の例祭） |- |秋季皇霊祭・秋季神殿祭 |-style="background:#ddf" |[[神嘗祭]] |- |[[新嘗祭]] |-style="background:#ddf" |[[賢所]]御神楽 |- |[[大正天皇]]例祭（先帝以前三代の例祭） |-style="background:#ddf" |節折・大祓 |}

{| style="border:1px solid #ddd;background-color:#F9F9F9;padding:5px;font-size:85%" |style="background:#cce;font-size:118%;padding:0 1em 0 1em" align=center|[[Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace]] |- |{{ill|All Sides Worship|ja|四方拝}}・{{ill|New Year's Festival|ja|歳旦祭}} |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|First Festival|ja|元始祭}} |- |{{ill|Start of Musical Performance|ja|奏事始}} |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|Emperor Showa|ja|昭和天皇}} Festival ({{ill|Previous Emperor's Festival|ja|先帝祭}}) |- |{{ill|Emperor Komei|ja|孝明天皇}} Example Festival (Example festival of the three generations before the previous emperor) |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|Prayer for Good Harvest|ja|祈年祭}} |- |{{ill|Eternal Longevity Festival|ja|天長祭}} (Eternal Longevity Festival Celebration) |-style="background:#ddf" |Spring {{ill|Imperial Spirit Festival|ja|皇霊祭}}・Spring {{ill|Shrine Festival|ja|神殿祭}} |- |{{ill|Emperor Jinmu Festival|ja|神武天皇祭}}・{{ill|Imperial Spirit Shrine|ja|皇霊殿}} {{ill|Sacred Kagura|ja|御神楽}} |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|Empress Kōjun|ja|香淳皇后}} Example Festival (Example festival of the previous empress) |- |{{ill|Ritual Bowing|ja|節折}}・{{ill|Great Purification|ja|大祓}} |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|Emperor Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} Example Festival (Example festival of the three generations before the previous emperor) |- |Autumn Imperial Spirit Festival・Autumn Shrine Festival |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|Divine Taste Festival|ja|神嘗祭}} |- |{{ill|New Rice Tasting Festival|ja|新嘗祭}} |-style="background:#ddf" |{{ill|Virtuous Place|ja|賢所}} Sacred Kagura |- |{{ill|Emperor Taishō|ja|大正天皇}} Example Festival (Example festival of the three generations before the previous emperor) |-style="background:#ddf" |Ritual Bowing・Great Purification |}

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] }}

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:original pages]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[simple:User:Immanuelle/Japanese Imperial Rituals updated]]

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:original pages]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[simple:User:Immanuelle/Japanese Imperial Rituals updated]]

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[simple:User:Immanuelle/Japanese Imperial Rituals updated]]

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:User:Immanuelle/Japanese Imperial Rituals updated]]

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:pages with former wikipedia userpage links]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[sn:User:Immanuelle/Japanese Imperial Rituals updated]]

== Notes == {{Notelist}} ==Documentation== Update to the old [[:Template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] template. It combines two similar Japanese wikipedia templates: [[:ja:Template:令制祭祀]] which has no foreign language equivalents and and [[:ja:Template:皇室祭祀]] which is connected to the rest of the wikidata entries [[en:template:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[ja:Template:皇室祭祀]][[fr:Modèle:Cérémonies rituelles du Palais Impérial]] {{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[sn:Japanese Imperial Rituals]] [[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]][[en:Japanese Imperial Rituals]]}} [[sn:User:Immanuelle/Japanese Imperial Rituals updated]] {{wikidata link|Q22821801}}
